NARRATIVE_THESIS: Why this scene? What emotional response does it trigger? How does it serve the 5-shot arc?

TEMPORAL_AUDIO_SYNC.AUDIO_BEAT_MAP: Where the kicks/snares/swells hit (e.g., Bass swell 0ms-1200ms, hard snare at 3100ms)
TEMPORAL_AUDIO_SYNC.CUT_REACTION: How the visual movement reacts to the audio beat (e.g., speed ramps up 20% exactly on the 3100ms snare)

OPTICS_AND_RIGGING.APERTURE: Depth of field indicator (e.g., f/2.8 shallow, f/8 deep)
OPTICS_AND_RIGGING.CAMERA_POSITION: Physical placement relative to subject (e.g., low-angle, waist-level, top-down)

KINETIC_PATHWAY.PRIMARY_MOVEMENT: Pan, Tilt, Dolly, Truck, Pedestal, or Roll
KINETIC_PATHWAY.PARALLAX_TARGET: The foreground/background relationship to establish 3D depth
KINETIC_PATHWAY.EASING_CURVE: Linear, Ease-In, Ease-Out, or Bezier pathing

PRESERVATION_AND_MASKING.STRICT_ZONES: Specific architectural geometries in the source photo that MUST NOT hallucinate or warp
PRESERVATION_AND_MASKING.ALLOWED_FLEXIBILITY: Areas where the model can invent (e.g., sky, foliage, water ripples)

SEAMLESS_TRANSITION_ARCHITECTURE.INGRESS_SEAM: How this scene receives the momentum from the previous scene
SEAMLESS_TRANSITION_ARCHITECTURE.EGRESS_SEAM: How this scene sets up the exact visual vector for the next scene

FAL_GENERATION_PROMPT: The final 1800+ character string passed to the video model, compiling all the above into natural language.
